[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001000101 3
1 101001110 5
2 011110011 6
3 010101101 5
4 011110110 6
5 111010101 6
6 110010001 4
7 111001100 5
